prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 5. Market for Registrant's Common Equity, Related Stockholder Matters and Issuer Purchases of Equity Securities". The next section is "Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations".
Find where Item 5 ends — right before the "Item 7" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 5 before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
(1) In September 2023, the Company’s Board of Directors authorized the repurchase of up to $10 billion of its common stock, with no expiration date, and in
December 2024, the Board of Directors increased the share repurchase authorization by an additional $15 billion, also with no expiration date. For further
information regarding stock repurchase activity, see Note 10 Stockholders’ Equity to the consolidated financial statements in this Annual Report.
(2) Average price paid per share includes costs associated with the repurchases but excludes the 1% excise tax on stock repurchases imposed by the Inflation
Reduction Act of 2022.
